claim: The prediction in atom ATOM_T013_S001_PRE_02 ("I think it's changing quite fundamentally. I think roughly speaking software ...") is the resolution of the blocker in atom ATOM_T005_S023_BLO_01 ("And the main issue is that it fails to reward exploration. So what do I mean ...").
first_principles_validity_hypothesis: The predicted future state contains a mechanism that removes the named blocker; the prediction is therefore a market signal for the resolution mechanism.
why_novel_vs_speaker: The speaker frames the prediction (snippet S001) and the blocker (snippet S023) as independent statements; the resolution link is asserted by the analogy engine.
why_potentially_useful: Predictions that resolve known blockers are higher-value than predictions that simply extrapolate trends — they imply an unaddressed market need.
